scene1_hook: No child should have to fight cancer alone.
scene2_problem: Every year, thousands of children are diagnosed with cancer and other life-threatening diseases. For many families, treatment costs are devastating — without help, they have nowhere to turn.
scene3_stakes: Without continued funding, life-saving research slows down. Children who could be saved may never get the chance.
scene4_solution: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital treats kids regardless of families' ability to pay. Your donation directly funds cures — and keeps families together.
scene5_ask: Will you help save a child's life today? Donate now at DMPGH.com and give a family hope.
